title: Minecraft Vintage Edition
description: Minecraft Vintage brings the nostalgic feeling back to Minecraft. Brings back old textures, models, and sounds back to life and also alter mobs to fit with the changes.
body: ![MC Vintage Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09fbff5f98d5b122c7e2de7c5dbe0928cf53ee07.png) ### **Minecraft: Vintage Bring that nostalgic feeling with old textures, models, and Sounds.** **______________________________________________________________________________** ![view of water and cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/379ca0156870005047e33e86f87fe2b94cbe5d4c_0.webp) **Older texture and entity models mixed with changes to bring then all in line with a vintage feel.** ![work stations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60ff970e22876a426249fb595345515fa3cd33d9_0.webp) Change Model Textures for more vintage feel. ![Model texture changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ee64e9d2b1f8d8000ca8500d96565ad404124e.png)
